attributes.action: Ban everyone from carrying knives,blades and ceremonial knives
attributes.additional_details: Carrying of weapons for any reason needs to lead to prosecution, unless the person has a licence to carry one for work purposes or hunting. Ceremonial knives should never be carried.
attributes.background: Introduce a clear policy banning knives of any kind, including religious or ceremonial blades. Everywhere should remain completely weapon free. (Knives for work purposes or hunting allowable with a licence)

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: “Ban carrying religious, cultural & ceremonial bladed & pointed items in public” https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/770412

You may also be interested in this petition: "Ban the sale of machetes and hunting knives to those without a licence" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764047
